title: Hornet Removal in Bed-Stuy Brooklyn | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Bedford-Stuyvesant, Brooklyn. Safe, fast hornet nest elimination for $350-$550. Licensed experts serving Bed-Stuy homes and businesses.
intro: Hornets building nests around your Bed-Stuy brownstone or apartment building can pose serious risks to residents and passersby. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, professional hornet removal services throughout Bedford-Stuyvesant, safely eliminating aggressive hornet colonies from porches, eaves, gardens, and building exteriors. Our experienced technicians protect your family, tenants, and neighbors from painful stings and recurring infestations.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Bed-Stuy homeowners and property managers for years with safe, effective hornet removal that addresses the root cause. Our licensed technicians use proven methods to eliminate hornet nests completely, offer transparent pricing between $350-$550, and provide follow-up inspections to ensure your property remains hornet-free.
localContext: From historic brownstones along Stuyvesant Avenue to multi-family buildings near the Fulton Street corridor, Bed-Stuy's diverse architecture offers numerous spots where hornets build nests in eaves, overhangs, and backyards. The neighborhood's mature trees around Herbert Von King Park and residential gardens create ideal hornet habitats that require professional removal to keep the community safe.

faqs.question: How much does hornet removal cost in Bed-Stuy?
faqs.answer: Hornet removal in Bedford-Stuyvesant typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on nest location, size, and accessibility. We provide upfront estimates before beginning work and never charge hidden fees.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Bed-Stuy?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day hornet removal service throughout Bed-Stuy. Most hornet nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, though larger or hard-to-reach nests may require additional time for safe elimination.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my Bed-Stuy brownstone or apartment building?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our technicians use targeted treatments and protective equipment to safely remove hornet nests without damaging your property's exterior, woodwork, or landscaping. We take extra care with Bed-Stuy's historic brownstones and vintage architecture.

faqs.question: What's the difference between hornets, wasps, and yellow jackets?
faqs.answer: Hornets are larger than most wasps and yellow jackets, build paper-like aerial nests, and are generally more aggressive when defending their colony. While all three can sting, hornets deliver more venom per sting and often require professional removal due to their defensive behavior and nest size.
